mapper.select: SELECT 0 AS CTR_SEQ, c.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, c.SSPS_DL_ID, c.SSPS_TYP_CD, c.DL_P_RNMCNO, c.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, c.INST_ID, c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.UPD_ID, c.UPD_DT, COALESCE(a.DL_AMT, 0) AS DL_AMT, COALESCE(a.DL_CCY, 'KRW') AS DL_CCY FROM NIC66B c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SUM(DL_AMT) AS DL_AMT, MAX(DL_CCY) AS DL_CCY FROM NIC75B GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) a ON a.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = c.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND a.SSPS_DL_ID = c.SSPS_DL_ID WHERE c.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND c.SSPS_DL_ID = #{ctrId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, INST_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{trxnDt}, #{ctrNo}, #{trxnTpCd}, 'CTR', #{custNo}, #{ctrStCd}, #{fiuRptNo}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = #{ctrStCd}, INST_ID = #{fiuRptNo}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{ctrNo} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'
